name: Am I Fundable Components Registry
description: Reusable public-safe component inventory for the Funding Readiness Scorecard static site, result pages, embed surfaces, and printable report views.
globalRules: Do not expose sensitive partner, routing, payout, contact, credential, or borrower details.
Do not use certainty-based lending copy, rate promises, speed promises, credit-outcome promises, or final decision language.
Browser-facing components must never import internal-only registries.

components.name: Site Header
components.safeCopyNotes: Navigation labels should route to public pages only.

components.name: Hero Section
components.purpose: Page-level intro block with headline, lede, and CTA.
components.safeCopyNotes: CTA should invite scorecard use or review request, not application certainty.

components.name: CTA Button
components.safeCopyNotes: Use labels such as Get My Score, Request Review, View Documents, or Explore Funding Paths.

components.name: Scorecard Shell
components.purpose: Dedicated full-page scorecard and form flow.
components.safeCopyNotes: Collect only necessary user-entered fields; consent copy should explain the score is readiness guidance and subject to review.

components.name: Result Summary
components.purpose: Displays score tier, readiness explanation, and next steps.
components.safeCopyNotes: Describe readiness, potential paths, blockers, and recommended next steps.

components.name: Result Card Grid
components.purpose: Shows funding paths, blockers, next steps, and document prep.
components.safeCopyNotes: Cards should not name providers or expose internal matching logic.

components.name: FAQ List
components.purpose: Accessible question-and-answer sections for public pages.
components.safeCopyNotes: FAQ copy should be educational and avoid lending promises.

components.name: Embed Widget
components.purpose: Scoped scorecard embed surface for broker or partner sites.
components.safeCopyNotes: Embed must avoid host-page CSS pollution and private registry calls.

components.name: Printable Report
components.safeCopyNotes: Printed reports must include readiness guidance and review-required disclaimers.
